The '''Tangler Elite 1''' was a [[tangle gun]] which was popular among [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] because it could be attached to personal battle [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. The gun fired a triple strand of [[durawire]] with weighted ends.
